expectations.text: NCR intake fields + Minor severity per §3.3
expectations.evidence: 'Suspected severity: Minor (see §3.3 read below)' with each Minor criterion matched explicitly.
'Isolated... Contained... No recurrence pattern... No compliance/safety exposure' matched line by line against §3.3 triggers.
'Recommendation: Close — No CAPA' with branches A/B/C explicitly walked and B selected.
Why no CAPA / what containment resolved / trend exposure / reviewer — all four fields drafted discretely.

expectations.text: Does NOT invoke RCA tools or draft action plans
expectations.evidence: No Fishbone/5 Whys or action-plan tables — correctly out of scope for a no-escalate NCR.

expectations.text: Names correct HITL gate for no-escalate justification
expectations.evidence: Operator + monthly/quarterly QA Lead review cadence named correctly per §5.
